title: Supreme Court to decide validity of State control over Hindu temples in these 3 South States
description: The Supreme Court on Monday revived a batch of petitions challenging the constitutional validity of laws that regulate the administration of Hindu temples and religious endowments in Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana and Puducherry [Swami Dayananda Saraswathi Vs State of Tamil Nadu].A Bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and Satish Chandra Sharma recalled their earlier order from April 2025, which had directed the petitioners to approach the respective High Courts.The decision to recall the same
